footnotes.rehearsal_eliminated: Rehearsal rate eliminated effective Dec 10, 2023; the applicable daily rate applies.
footnotes.per_diem: Per diem is set in the contract (2023 TV/Theatrical summary: $70/day after ratification, $75/day two years later)—not on the dancer daily/weekly minimum table.
footnotes.travel: Travel and distant-location rules use full-day pay and reimbursements per the agreement—not separate dancer-table minimum rows.
